name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Soda Ka Main Sponsor
desc: Jethalal treats all his friends to a soda party at Abdul's shop. Popatlal catches Bhide for not being able to come up with a thought for the day.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Naye Nattu Kaka Ka Swagat
desc: The new Nattu Kaka is the first to arrive at the shop and makes a grand entry. Jethalal and Bagha welcome him to their family with open arms.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nattu Kaka Ka Hukkum
desc: The thief reveals that he was ordered by Nattu Kaka to help Jethalal. After Jethalal requests Inspector Pandey to let the thief go, Pandey Ji decides never to accept any case from the residents of Gokuldham Society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pandey Ji Ka Case
desc: Inspector Pandey makes sure that he has all the information before taking any action. Will he manage to solve the case?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Gada Electronics Mein Chor
desc: Jaggu wakes Jethalal in the middle of the night to tell him that someone is trying to rob his shop. How will Jethalal save his shop?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Peti Ke Andar Peti
desc: Bagha takes the help of Magan to secure the cash kept at the shop. However, Bagha's troubles get doubled as Jethalal gets stuck at a birthday party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Cheque Nahi Cash
desc: Bagha collects five lakh rupees cash from Mr Deepak and gets it to the shop safely. However, Bapuji informs Jethalal that they have to leave early for a birthday party.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dost Ki Help
desc: Jethalal's friend asks him for financial help, which he agrees to provide. However, Jethalal finds out that he does not have that money with him. How will he help his friend?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Surprises Tapu Sena
desc: To cheer Tapu Sena after the accident in the morning, Jethalal surprises them with a thoughtful gift. They return the favour by treating Jethalal with his favourite savouries.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Goli Ne Todi Jethalal Ki Khidki
desc: Goli accidentally breaks Jethalal's window while playing cricket. Will Jethalal get consumed in anger or forgive Tapu Sena?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sundar's Business Proposal
desc: Sundar gives Jethalal a business proposition. How will Jethalal respond to the proposal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – New Shop New Beginning
desc: Jethalal apologises to Inspector Pandey for failing to inform him that Bapuji wasn't missing. Jethalal and Bagha get excited to begin working in their new shop.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – New Shop Opened
desc: Bapuji inaugurates the renovated Gada Electronics shop in the nick of time as everyone celebrates Jethalal's happiness.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Hue Gayab
desc: Bhide tells Jethalal that he is unable to find Bapuji in the temple. Jethalal decides to report to Inspector Pandey that Bapuji has gone missing. Where could Bapuji have gone?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Inauguration Ka Josh
desc: The Gokuldham society members are elated and excited to be a part of the reopening of Gada Electronics. Will the event go as planned?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Ki Chitthi
desc: Jethalal comes to know that Daya won't be coming to Gokuldham for the shop's reopening. How will Jethalal react to this heartbreaking news?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Daya Bhabhi Ka Intezaar
desc: Jethalal eagerly waits for his wife and can't contain his excitement. Can Sundar deliver his promise?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dukaan Ready Hogayi
desc: Jethalal gives an invitation to all his friends for the reopening of his shop. Meanwhile, Sundar comes up with a plan to get Daya for the shop reopening. How will he manage that?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Ke Liye Gift
desc: The members of Gokuldham try to think of a thoughtful gift for Jethalal on the occasion of his shop's reopening. What will they get him?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Mehmaano Ko Aamantran
desc: Jethalal invites all his friends and asks them to get to the venue on time. Meanwhile, Bagha creates a special list for Jethalal to personally call and invite. Will they accept his invitation?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Kya Daya Ka Aana Cancel?
desc: Sundar gets into a dilemma as he struggles to gather the courage and tell Jethalal that Daya won't be turning up for the inauguration. Meanwhile, a famous newspaper editor pays a visit to Gokuldham society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sundar's Promise
desc: Jethalal is excited about his shop's reopening and invites all his neighbours and friends. Meanwhile, Sundar promises to bring Daya back to the colony for the reopening.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Inauguration Ki Taiyyari
desc: Jethalal invites friends and family over for the re-opening of his shop. Will everything go smooth for Jethalal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Meeting Pandit Ji
desc: Jethalal invites a famous astrologer to help him find the most auspicious time to re-open his shop. What suggestions will this astrologer give?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Contractor Gives The Good News
desc: Jethalal shares his worries about his shop with Sodhi, Bhide and Popatlal. Later, when Jethalal meets his contractor, he receives a piece of good news. What could it be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rumours About Gada Electronics
desc: Jethalal finds out that the daily newspaper did not get delivered in the morning. Later, he gets a piece of annoying news about his shop. What could it be about?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide's Mango Consignment
desc: Bhide receives a consignment of mangoes. He distributes it among his friends for everyone to enjoy.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal And Babita's Badminton Match
desc: Jethalal and Babita's badminton match begins. Jethalal reaches home late and finds Bapuji sleeping on the couch.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pratiksha Aur Paresh Ka Milan
desc: With Popatlal and Bapuji's help, Pratiksha and Paresh reconcile their love. Babita and Anjali play a friendly game of badminton.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Twist In The Tale
desc: Popatlal gets in touch with Pratiksha's ex-husband and informs him about the wedding. What drama will unfold when Paresh lands up at the venue?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pratiksha Ka Pyar
desc: Popatlal reveals that he knows who Pratiksha is in love with. He later asks Pratiksha to give her final decision. Will Popatlal receive the answer he wants to hear?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pratiksha Se Sawal
desc: The Gokuldham family makes a grand entry into the Puri family's mansion. After Pratiksha shows up, Popatlal asks her an important question. What answer will Popatlal receive?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Shagun Dene Ki Taiyari
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society get ready to meet the Puri family and give them the shagun. Sodhi arranges a bus for the Gokuldham family to travel together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rishte Ke Liye Haan Hai
desc: The Puri family calls Popatlal to tell him that they want Pratiksha to get married to him. However, they also reveal a shocking fact about Pratiksha's past. Will Popatlal look past it and accept the Puri family's proposal?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gayab Hai
desc: Everyone gathers in Jethalal's house to wait for Mr Puri's phone call. However, Popatlal is nowhere to be found. Where could he be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Kaha Hai?
desc: The colony members are excited to get Popatlal ready for his meeting with his to-be wife. Popatlal however, isn't opening his door nor is he answering his phone. Where could Popatlal be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ki Neend
desc: Popatlal wakes Sodhi and Bhide as he is unable to sleep due to a dog barking. Sodhi arranges for a medicine that will help Popatlal to sleep.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Gets Anxious
desc: Popatlal expresses his gratitude to everyone for accompanying him.  He has trouble falling asleep as he feels anxious about the Puri family's thoughts about him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Meets Pratiksha
desc: Babita suggests that Popatlal and Pratiksha should talk to each other in private. Jethalal gives his phone number to Mr Puri before the Gokuldam family takes their leave.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Meeting Pratiksha's Family
desc: The Gokuldham members are greeted by Mr Puri's secretary. Everyone introduces themselves to Pratiksha's family.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Searching For Pratiksha
desc: Sodhi arranges a minibus for the Gokuldham members to travel together to Pratiksha's house. However, they face some difficulty in finding where she lives. Will they manage to find her?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rishte Ka Dress Code
desc: Popatlal convinces everyone at Gokuldham to get dressed in a dress code. Everyone wears yellow and gets ready to meet Pratiksha and her family.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pratiksha Ka Invitation
desc: Popatlal gets an invitation from Pratiksha to meet her. He requests all his friends to get dressed in yellow and come along with him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Waiting For Pratiksha
desc: Popatlal gets tired of waiting for Pratiksha and asks the marriage bureau for her contact number. To kill time, Popatlal reads Pratiskha's bio with Tapu Sena.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ka Toota Phone
desc: Popatlal takes Bhide's help to rush to Jethalal's shop so he can get his phone repaired. Bagha helps with a replacement phone for Popatlal. Will Popatlal receive the call he has been waiting for?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Popatlal Ki Galat Information
desc: Popatlal joins Babita and Iyer for breakfast. They find out that the marriage bureau had the wrong information about Popatlal. How will Popatlal handle the situation?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Notice For Bhide
desc: All the couples of Gokuldham Society get together and set out to shop at the mall. A postman shows up at the society looking for Bhide. Will Bhide arrive in time to collect his letter?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Group Shopping
desc: The Mahila Mandal shops for vegetables together at the cart in the morning. They get excited after hearing Bhide's plan to shop at the mall and try to convince their husbands to take them to the sale. Will the Purush Mandal agree?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Madhvi Gets Upset
desc: Bhide angers Madhvi with his antics. Popatlal arrives at Bhide's house and offers him to help cheer Madhvi up. However, Bhide refuses and decides to turn Madhvi's frown into a smile by himself.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Thought Of The Day
desc: The Purush Mandal enjoys a glass of lemon soda at Abdul's shop. Jethalal reminds Bhide about writing the thought of the day on the board.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Catching The Jamakhor
desc: After Guddu Khatila dodges the police, he provokes Sodhi and Bhide. Guddu's men try to catch Sodhi and Bhide to get revenge on them for calling the police. Will Inspector Pandey arrive in time to save them?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Deal With A Jamakhor
desc: As Bhide goes to meet the mysterious man who is interested in buying his entire stock of lemons, he gets stopped by the police. The police try to arrest him first but soon realise that the main culprit here is the 'Jamakhor' who called Bhide. Can they nab this public hoarder?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Finding Buyers
desc: Bhide goes on a calling spree, trying to find a buyer for his lemons. However, most people either don't believe him or aren't interested in his offer. Will Bhide manage to get rid of the stock of lemons?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nimbu Ka Kya Karein?
desc: After Jethalal finds out that Bagha is planning to sell lemons, they quickly return them to Bhide before getting in trouble for hoarding. Bhide gets worried about what to do with the lemons. Will he find a solution?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nimbu Wali Lottery
desc: Bhide and Madhvi decide to sell the remaining lemons at a lower price. They fail to find a suitable buyer for the large number of lemons they have left. Who will buy them?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Lemons For Bhide
desc: Jethalal advises Bhide to get rid of the lemons before he gets in trouble with the police for hoarding them. Madhvi realises that the delivery of the lemons was meant for them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bappa Ki Delivery
desc: Bhide, under immense stress, almost runs over Popatlal with his Sakharam. Later, a mysterious delivery van drops three sacks at Bhide's residence. What could it be?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Life Gives No Lemons
desc: Bhide reaches a dead end while trying to procure the money that his clients owe him. Meanwhile, everyone at Gokuldham society struggles to find lemons. Will Bhide and Madhvi manage to fulfil the order?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Nimbu Ki Keemat
desc: Bapuji watches the news to find out that the price of lemons has shot up. Meanwhile, Bhide receives an order for lime pickles. How will Bhide manage to complete this order?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Music Ka Dose
desc: All members of the Gokuldham Society thank Bhide for a memorable musical night. Everyone returns home in a happy and fun mood.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Dancing To Old Songs
desc: The members of Gokuldham Society continue to sing along and dance to their favourite old songs. They reminisce and talk about the famous singers and songwriters of the yesteryears.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Golden Memories
desc: The members of Gokuldham Society continue to enjoy old Bollywood songs at the clubhouse. Everyone appreciates the soulful music of that era.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – The Tape Recorder Works
desc: When Bhide tries to turn on his music system, it does not work. Bagha uses all his skills to figure out the problem so everyone can sing and dance to old Bollywood music.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sargam Orchestra Repaired
desc: Bagha tells Jethalal how he managed to repair Bhide's tape recorder. Bhide asks Abdul to gather everyone at the clubhouse so they can enjoy some old music together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Amulya Virasat
desc: Bhide stops Madhavi from giving away his prized possession to the 'bhangar wala'. When Jethalal brings Bhide's old music system for repair, Bagha gets worried about the situation.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhangaar Wala Aya
desc: Everyone at Gokuldham is dealing with the problem of having too much old stuff at home. Bhola Bhai comes to the rescue to collect the 'Bhangaar' from everyone's homes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – False Alarm
desc: Jethalal apologises to Inspector Pandey for the misinformation he had, due to which he had to call the police. To bring about some change, Jethalal decides to prepare soda for his friends by himself.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Godown Mein Chori
desc: Sonu returns from her Lonavala trip bearing gifts for her parents. Jethalal tells about his eventful day to his friends while sipping soda at Abdul's shop.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji's Social Service
desc: Bapuji clears everyone's misunderstanding about his nightly escapades. The Purush Mandal apologises to Bapuji for accusing him of drinking without confronting him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Back To His Senses
desc: Dr Hathi gets medicine for Jethalal that will bring him back to his senses. Bapuji gets extremely angry at the Purush Mandal for handling the situation poorly. How will everyone manage to calm Bapuji?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal In Trouble
desc: Bapuji clears all the confusion about his newfound habit. However, the issue of a drunk Jethalal still persists. Can Jethalal's friends get him out of this mess before Bapuji finds out?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi's Plan Backfires
desc: Bapuji introduces his childhood friends to the Purush Mandal and comes clean about his actions. All of Jethalal's friends try to keep Bapuji away from a drunk Jethalal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi Ka Secret Plan
desc: Sodhi locks Jethalal in a room and comes up with a secret plan to confront Bapuji. The Mahila Mandal gets shocked when they find out about Bapuji's activities.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Jethalal Fails To Confront Bapuji
desc: Jethalal struggles to confront Bapuji about his drinking habit. He goes back to his friends, seeking help for the same.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Beta Baap Ko Kaise Toke?
desc: Jethalal gets shocked when he finds out about Bapuji's drinking habit. Everyone discusses how they can help Bapuji get rid of his addiction.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Toofaan Aa Gaya Hai
desc: Jethalal returns from his client meeting in Pune to discover that Bapuji is still unwell. Taarak gathers everyone at Popatlal's house so they can plan and break the news of Bapuji's nightly escapades to Jethalal.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Proof Against Bapuji
desc: The men of Gokuldham worry about how to break the news of Bapuji's night out to Jethalal. Jethalal returns from his meeting and suspects that all his friends are hiding something from him.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Recording Bapuji's Actions
desc: Sodhi and Popatlal tell everyone what they saw at the bar. They hide in the garden and record Bapuji entering the society in a drunken state.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Doing Party Sharty
desc: Sodhi and Popatlal follow Bapuji into a bar. They call everyone so that they can see the truth with their own eyes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Following Bapuji
desc: To prove he is right, Sodhi and Popatlal decide to follow Bapuji. After witnessing Bapuji's actions, Sodhi and Popatlal refuse to believe their eyes.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Gets Left Alone
desc: Jethalal has to leave Bapuji alone as he has to visit Pune for a client meeting. Bapuji forces him to stay in Pune for the night. What could Bapuji be up to?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Party Sharty Ke Lakshan
desc: Bapuji complains about a headache and acidity to Jethalal. All the men of Gokuldham Society gather at Jethalal's house to take care of Bapuji.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – No One Believes Sodhi
desc: When no one believes his story, Sodhi convinces everyone to sniff Bapuji to find out the truth. After finding no trace of alcohol from Bapuji, the members of the society force Sodhi to apologise.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Sodhi Ka Sachh
desc: After Sodhi tells everyone what he saw, Jethalal refuses to believe him. Sodhi narrates everything that happened and tries to convince them.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – A Walk To Matka Shop
desc: Everyone takes an evening walk to visit a kulfi store after their dinner. Sodhi returns from his party and is desperate to tell Jethalal what he saw.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Goes Out To Party
desc: Jethalal comes home early to return Babita's mixer grinder and see Bapuji off. Jethalal and Popatlal enjoy a lavish feast together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Busy Day At Gada Electronics
desc: Bagha declines Babita's call on Jethalal's phone as he was preoccupied with a client call. Popatlal and Babita put Jethalal in a spot where he has to decide at whose house will he have dinner. Who will Jethalal choose?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Ka Jigri
desc: Bapuji's childhood friend calls him out of the blue and invites him for a night out. Popatlal invites Jethalal, who will be alone, to his house for dinner.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bapuji Talks To Himself
desc: The men of the Gokuldham Society sit at the soda shop and discuss their lives. Bhide and Madhavi spot Bapuji talking to himself on his balcony.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Permission For Lonavala Trip
desc: Sonu gets scared to ask her father for permission to visit Lonavala with Tapu Sena. The men of the Gouldham Society meet at Abdul's shop and talk about Tapu Sena's absence from the society.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pom Pom Ka Parivar
desc: The Gokuldham family band together to find Pom Pom so they can welcome her to the society. However, they find Pom Pom with a group of other cats and decide to let them be together.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Tapu Sena Ki Billi
desc: Tapu Sena tells everyone about how they adopted Pom Pom. Popatlal realises his anger is misdirected and expresses his gratitude to everyone for saving him from a superstitious family.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Rishta Nikla Haath Se
desc: Popatlal's guests get furious when they spot Pom Pom and leave Gokuldham in anger. Popatlal feels betrayed and is out to get his revenge. Will Tapu Sena come forward with the truth?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Ladkiwalo Ka Swagat
desc: Popatlal asks Bhide to join him in welcoming his guests to the Gokuldham Society. Tapu Sena runs into multiple problems while looking for Pom Pom. Will Popatlal's meeting go smoothly?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Pom Pom In Popatlal's House
desc: With Popatlal out to find a bouquet for his guests, Pom Pom wreaks havoc in his house. Tapu Sena enlists Abdul's help to get into Popatlal's house to retrieve Pom Pom. Will they manage to hide Pom Pom before Popatlal returns?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Billi Gokuldham Mein Hi Hai
desc: Everyone gets shocked when Popatlal informs them that his guests will soon arrive. Tapu Sena finds out that Pom Pom has made its way to Popatlal's house through the terrace.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Billi Ne Dilaya Sodhi Ko Gussa
desc: Pom Pom enters Sodhi's house and breaks his bottles, and eats Roshan's cupcakes. He gets furious and confronts Bhide and Abdul about the cat. Will Tapu Sena's lies get caught?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Chasing Pom Pom Around
desc: Tapu Sena frantically chases Pom Pom around Gokuldham Society. Pom Pom, who is in a playful mood, sneaks into one flat after another. Will it get caught?

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Apshagun Kuch Nahi Hai
desc: Popatlal shows his appreciation for Bhide's quick action to make the society cat-free. Abdul and Tapu Sena worry about their situation after lying to the members of Gokuldham.

name: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah – Bhide Wants The Box
desc: Sonu calls Tapu to inform him that her father is on his way to get the box in which Pom Pom resides. Everyone believes Abdul's lie that Gokuldham is now cat-free. What will Tapu Sena do when their lies are caught?
